title: Signals behind your code
description: Read change, ownership, activity, and delivery stability signals from Git history.

onboarding.title: Start with a repository
onboarding.description: Choose a local Git repository before reading GitPulse signals.
onboarding.body: GitPulse analyzes local Git history only. Select a repository to enable branch, remote, and signal controls.

workspaceDetails.title: Workspace details
workspaceDetails.description: Analysis controls for the current repository.
workspaceDetails.checkingRemoteDescription: Fetching remote refs and comparing the current branch with upstream.
workspaceDetails.pullingRemoteDescription: Pulling remote changes with fast-forward only.
workspaceDetails.switchingBranchDescription: Checking out the branch and refreshing analysis.

remoteStatus.title: Remote status
remoteStatus.description: Run a remote check to see whether this branch is current.
remoteStatus.noUpstreamDescription: This branch does not have a remote tracking branch yet.
remoteStatus.dirtyDescription: Commit or stash local changes before pulling.

history.title: Analysis history
history.description: Recent analysis runs for this repository let you compare the current signal with the previous baseline.
